Exception Vectors.Name: Reset
Exception Vectors.EMPTY_1: Technically not an exception; as there is no exception return from reset.

Exception Vectors.EMPTY_1: Technically not an exception; as there is no exception return from reset.

Exception Vectors.Name: SVCall
Exception Vectors.Interrupt Type: Supervisor call (SMC, SVC or HMC instruction, when not in non-secure mode or EL2 and HCR.TGE is set)

If HCR.TGE is set for non-secure user mode, traps to hypervisor
See ARMv8-A spec for details
